'''zakazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallmouth|smallmouth]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallmouth|smallmouth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zakazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zækæzhæth|zækæzhæth]] || [[word:zækæzhæj|zækæzhæj]] || [[word:zækæzhæsh|zækæzhæsh]] || [[word:zækæzhæ|zækæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakakazhath|zakakazhath]] || [[word:zakakazhaj|zakakazhaj]] || [[word:zakakazhash|zakakazhash]] || [[word:zakakazha|zakakazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakazhath|zakazhath]] || [[word:zakazhaj|zakazhaj]] || [[word:zakazhash|zakazhash]] || [[word:zakazha|zakazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakafzhath|zakafzhath]] || [[word:zakafzhaj|zakafzhaj]] || [[word:zakafzhash|zakafzhash]] || [[word:zakafzhaf|zakafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zakazhatha|zakazhatha]] || [[word:zakazhaja|zakazhaja]] || [[word:zakazhasha|zakazhasha]] || [[word:zakazhaka|zakazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zakazhath|zakazhath]] || [[word:zakazhaj|zakazhaj]] || [[word:zakazhash|zakazhash]] || [[word:zakazha|zakazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zakazhathal|zakazhathal]] || [[word:zakazhajal|zakazhajal]] || [[word:zakazhashal|zakazhashal]] || [[word:zakazhakal|zakazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zakazhathatha|zakazhathatha]] || [[word:zakazhajaja|zakazhajaja]] || [[word:zakazhashasha|zakazhashasha]] || [[word:zakazhaka|zakazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zakazhathan|zakazhathan]] || [[word:zakazhajan|zakazhajan]] || [[word:zakazhashan|zakazhashan]] || [[word:zakazhakan|zakazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zakazhathaoro|zakazhathaoro]] || [[word:zakazhajaoro|zakazhajaoro]] || [[word:zakazhashaoro|zakazhashaoro]] || [[word:zakazhakaoro|zakazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
